project.name: agent-orchestrator
project.description: Three-layer agent orchestration plugin: Kimi plans, DeepSeek builds, MiniMax queries. Manages plans with items executed by AI models, supports skill classification and auto-execution, uses checkpoints for milestone verification, and provides real-time WebSocket events.

nodes.name: Plan Management
nodes.summary: Core domain for creating, activating, executing, and completing plans. Plans are generated by Kimi from user tasks, validated, persisted to SQLite, and executed item-by-item by assigned model agents.

nodes.name: Model Orchestration
nodes.summary: Three-tier AI model hierarchy (Kimi → DeepSeek → MiniMax) with automatic fallback. Each model has a specialized role: Kimi plans and reviews, DeepSeek builds and executes, MiniMax queries and searches. Fallback triggers on network errors, 429/5xx HTTP errors.

nodes.name: Skill Execution
nodes.summary: Classifies skills into INTERACTIVE/TOOL_REQUIRED/AUTO categories using regex-based signal detection. Builds self-contained subagent prompts for AUTO skills, returns manual instructions for INTERACTIVE/TOOL_REQUIRED skills. Hybrid mode splits execution between subagent and main session.

nodes.name: Checkpoint & Verification
nodes.summary: Milestone-based checkpoint system that pauses execution every N completed items for Kimi review. Collects agent outputs per milestone, verifies quality, and gates further execution. Supports create and verify actions with activity logging.

nodes.name: Real-time Communication
nodes.summary: WebSocket-based event broadcasting system for real-time plan/item/checkpoint status updates. Supports client subscriptions to specific plans, dual-mode emission (in-process broadcast vs HTTP bridge), and automatic retry on failure.

nodes.name: Data Persistence
nodes.summary: SQLite-based state management with 6 tables: plans, plan_items, checkpoints, agent_threads, messages, activity_log. Lazy-loaded singleton DB with migration support. All orchestrator state is persisted and queryable.

nodes.name: Subagent Dispatch
nodes.summary: Dual-path subagent execution: D1 (direct LLM API call via SubagentRunner) and D2 (long-lived OpenCode server). Auto-dispatcher prefers D2 when healthy, falls back to D1. Includes health checks, restart logic, and dispatch counting.

nodes.name: API Serving
nodes.summary: HTTP API server (Bun.serve) with RESTful endpoints for plans, checkpoints, threads, status, and internal events. Includes CORS, authentication, WebSocket upgrade, and dashboard serving. Central request router with regex-based path matching.

nodes.name: Analyze Task Mode
nodes.summary: Kimi analyzes the user task to decide whether it needs 'plan' mode (analysis only) or 'build' mode (full execution with plan generation). Returns mode decision with suggested skills.

nodes.name: Create Plan
nodes.summary: Generates a structured plan document via Kimi (with DeepSeek fallback), validates it, persists to SQLite with items, and emits plan.created event. Each plan has a title, items array with executor assignments, and milestone tracking.

nodes.name: Execute Plan Items
nodes.summary: Sequential execution of plan items by their assigned executor (DeepSeek for build, MiniMax for query). Updates item status, logs activity, emits events, and tracks completion/failure counts.

nodes.name: Model Fallback Chain
nodes.summary: When primary model fails (network error, 429, 5xx), automatically falls back to secondary model. Kimi → DeepSeek for plan generation. Includes retry with exponential backoff for 429 errors.

nodes.name: Classify Skills
nodes.summary: Scans SKILL.md content using layered regex signal detection (strong TOOL > strong INTERACTIVE > strong AUTO > weak signals) to classify each skill as TOOL_REQUIRED, INTERACTIVE, or AUTO. Results determine execution path.

nodes.name: Build Auto-Execution Prompt
nodes.summary: Generates a self-contained subagent prompt from classified AUTO skills. Groups by tier (P0/P1/P2), maps entry types to tool instructions, includes execution rules and required JSON output schema. INTERACTIVE/TOOL_REQUIRED skills are returned as manual instructions.

nodes.name: Auto-Dispatch Skills
nodes.summary: Dispatches AUTO-classified skills to subagent via D1 (direct LLM) or D2 (OpenCode server) path. D2 preferred when healthy, D1 as fallback. Includes health checks, restart attempts, and dispatch counting.

nodes.name: Create Checkpoint
nodes.summary: Creates a milestone checkpoint when N items complete. Collects agent outputs for completed items, stores in SQLite with 'pending' verification status. Emits checkpoint.created event.

nodes.name: Verify Checkpoint
nodes.summary: Kimi reviews the checkpoint (with DeepSeek fallback). Verifies quality of completed items, provides feedback. Passed checkpoints increment milestone counter; failed ones block further execution. User can override result.

nodes.name: Broadcast Events
nodes.summary: Real-time event broadcasting via WebSocket. Events include plan lifecycle (created/activated/completed), item progress (started/completed), checkpoint status, and model fallback notifications. Supports plan-specific subscriptions.

nodes.name: HTTP Request Routing
nodes.summary: Central request router that matches URL patterns via regex to API handlers. Supports plans CRUD, checkpoint management, thread messaging, status queries, internal events, and dashboard serving. Includes CORS and auth middleware.

nodes.name: Analyze Task Mode
nodes.summary: KimiClient.analyzeTaskMode() determines if task needs planning or building. Returns mode, reason, and suggested_skills with P0/P1/P2 tiers.

nodes.name: Generate Plan Document
nodes.summary: KimiClient.generatePlan() creates structured plan with items. Falls back to DeepSeekClient on failure. Returns planDoc with title, items array, and suggested_skills.

nodes.name: Validate Plan Document
nodes.summary: PlanParser.validate() checks plan has title, non-empty items array, and each item has valid executor (kimi/deepseek/minimax). Returns validation errors.

nodes.name: Persist Plan to Database
nodes.summary: Creates plan record and plan_item records in SQLite. Calculates milestones_total from item count and milestone interval. Logs activity and fallback info.

nodes.name: Execute Item via DeepSeek
nodes.summary: DeepSeekClient.executeTask() runs the plan item implementation. Returns structured result with status and output. Updates item to completed/failed in DB.

nodes.name: Execute Item via MiniMax
nodes.summary: MiniMaxClient.searchCode() performs code search/query for the plan item. Returns search results. Updates item status in DB.

nodes.name: Chat with Fallback
nodes.summary: BaseModelClient.chatWithFallback() attempts primary model with 3 retries on 429, then falls back to secondary. Returns content with _fallback metadata.

nodes.name: Scan SKILL.md Content
nodes.summary: Reads SKILL.md file, strips frontmatter, and tests against layered regex signals (strong TOOL, strong INTERACTIVE, strong AUTO, weak signals) to determine category.

nodes.name: Split AUTO vs Manual Skills
nodes.summary: AutoExecutor.buildPrompt() classifies each skill and splits into AUTO (for subagent) and INTERACTIVE/TOOL_REQUIRED (for main session). Returns prompt + classified arrays.

nodes.name: Generate Subagent Prompt
nodes.summary: Builds self-contained prompt with plan context, skills grouped by tier, tool-mapping instructions, execution rules (P0 blocking, P1 skip-on-fail, P2 optional), and required JSON output schema.

nodes.name: Dispatch via D1 (LLM API)
nodes.summary: SubagentRunner.run() sends prompt directly to model client (DeepSeek/MiniMax) with timeout. Parses JSON response, returns structured result with executed_skills and status.

nodes.name: Dispatch via D2 (OpenCode Server)
nodes.summary: AutoDispatcher dispatches via long-lived OpenCode server process. Falls back to D1 on failure. Server health checked before dispatch.

nodes.name: Check Milestone Threshold
nodes.summary: MilestoneManager.shouldCheckpoint() checks if completed items count hits the interval boundary (every N items). Returns boolean for checkpoint creation trigger.

nodes.name: Collect Agent Outputs
nodes.summary: Gathers outputs from all agents (kimi/deepseek/minimax) for items before the milestone index. Used for checkpoint review context.

nodes.name: Kimi Reviews Checkpoint
nodes.summary: KimiClient.reviewCheckpoint() evaluates checkpoint quality. Returns pass/fail status with feedback. Falls back to auto-pass on Kimi unavailability. User can override result.

nodes.name: Broadcast via WebSocket
nodes.summary: WebSocketBroadcaster.broadcast() sends JSON message to all connected clients. Filters by plan subscription. Logs delivery count.

nodes.name: Emit Event
nodes.summary: Events module routes events either in-process (broadcaster) or via HTTP bridge to internal endpoint. Includes retry with exponential backoff for HTTP mode.

nodes.name: Route HTTP Request
nodes.summary: Regex-based URL pattern matching to API handlers. Matches plan CRUD, checkpoint, thread, status, and internal event routes. Returns 404 for unmatched paths.

nodes.name: Authenticate Request
nodes.summary: Auth middleware checks Authorization header on non-dashboard routes. Skips auth for OPTIONS and dashboard/static paths.
